name: Notional quantity—Leg 1
description: The notional quantity of the underlier on a per-period basis.
format: Conforms to 2024 Rules specifications; 'all 9s' is an allowable value.
optionalityRules: Conditionally required for NEWT, MODI, CORR, REVI, if applicable.
Not reported for TERM, EROR, PRTO Action types.
valueRules: If reported, Notional quantity—Leg 1 is less than or equal to Total notional quantity—Leg 1.
If the value(s) for these data elements is not known at the time of reporting, ‘all 9s’ is reported, but is updated to the amount subsequently determined, using a MODI-TRAD report.

Where the transaction has a notional quantity schedule that is not a constant notional quantity in each period, Notional quantity—Leg 1 is updated when each new period commences, using a MODI-TRAD report.
